purpose: Activity Log entry — Luis lunch 2026-05-13: IPA consolidation strategy + Sovereign Phoenix acquisition path

text.content: Luis HF-gyn lunch — IPA consolidation + Sovereign Phoenix acquisition

Healthfirst + Fidelis pay PMPM admin fee to IPAs. Central Queens model takes specialists at no margin (annual fee only). DocPro already $50k down on Sovereign Phoenix ($600k total). Sovereign Phoenix has $1.2M legacy loan from 2020 failures — rolls into purchase price. Master-IPA consolidation plan: SPIPA + Starling + NY IPA + Sovereign Phoenix into one entity. SPIPA 5k HF + Starling 25k HF ≈ 30k MMR potential. NY IPA has Healthfirst contract talks 5/14. Dream team: Luis (contracts), DocPro (billing/risk/coding), Ahmed + Aaron + Brian (provider onboarding/relationships). Strategic framing: IPA = next income lever; exit strategy out of lab.
Schedule full team meeting (Luis, Ahmed, Brian, DocPro) within 1 week to advance Sovereign Phoenix acquisition. Diligence on $1.2M loan terms. Track NY IPA Healthfirst contract outcome 5/14.
